markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff call to align on the AI-powered content partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Partnership Confirmed:** Turnstile will partner with GrowthX to build organic authority and compete with Stripe by publishing daily, high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)
  - [**Phased Approach:** The engagement begins with editorial content (blog posts) to build a foundation, followed by programmatic content (e.g., comparison pages) to scale.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [**Fast Time-to-Publish:** Content publishing is targeted to begin within 3–4 weeks of the December 8 kickoff, contingent on Turnstile's responsiveness and blog setup.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
  - [**Turnstile's Role:** Provide brand/product assets, review drafts, and ensure the blog is ready in Webflow with a dedicated user seat.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)

## Topics

### Turnstile Context & Goals

  - [**Product:** A quote-to-cash platform spanning quoting, billing, reporting, and subscription management.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**ICP & Pricing:** Pre-seed to \~$30M ARR companies. Pricing is usage-based (\~0.5% of billing volume), not per-transaction.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [**Competitors:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
      - [**Primary:** Stripe Billing.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
      - [**Newer:** Tabs, Sequence, Orb.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [**Indirect:** QuickBooks, HubSpot.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [**Marketing Goal:** Build organic authority quickly to stand out in a crowded market and provide founders with content for social media.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

### GrowthX Solution & Process

  - [**Service:** End-to-end content creation (strategy, SEO/GEO, publishing) to build an organic engine and reduce reliance on paid channels.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
  - [**Team:** A dedicated pod (Managing Director, Editor, Content Manager) with deep marketing expertise (e.g., ex-TechCrunch, G2, TripAdvisor).](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [**Phased Engagement:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Strategy Sprint):** Develops a content roadmap and "artifacts" (brand voice, ICP) to train the AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (Growth Execution):** Daily publishing begins, with the review process as the only bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1328.0)
  - [**Content Types:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Editorial:** Informational blog posts and thought leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Programmatic:** Scaled content (e.g., comparison pages) generated from a data source (e.g., Turnstile's CRM integrations, public pricing models).](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [**Workflow:** A "chain of thought" AI process with human oversight, using multiple LLMs (GPT-4, Perplexity) and fact-checking to ensure quality and credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2534.0)

### Logistics & Collaboration

  - [**Timeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
      - [**Kickoff:** Week of December 8.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
      - [**Publishing:** Targeted to begin by the end of December.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2218.0)
  - [**CMS:** Webflow is preferred. Turnstile must create a blog template and provide a user seat for GrowthX to stage and publish content.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
  - [**Collaboration:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3135.0)
      - [**Meetings:** Weekly syncs (can be bi-weekly).](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3135.0)
      - [**Communication:** A shared Slack channel for daily updates and feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3169.0)
  - [**Turnstile Preparation:** Provide brand guides, product one-pagers, ICP profiles, and a competitor list.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2980.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
      - [Resend the contract to Jordan for signature.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3337.0)
      - [Share a list of required preparation materials.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2980.0)
      - [Connect with the delivery team to provide Seema with insights on successful early-stage partnerships.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3390.0)
  - [**Seema:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
      - [Provide Jordan's contact info for the contract.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3337.0)
      - [Schedule the kickoff and product deep-dive calls for the week of December 8.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=3315.0)
  - [**Turnstile Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2980.0)
      - [Prepare all brand, product, and ICP documents.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2980.0)
      - [Build the Webflow blog template and create a user seat for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/yh8ios1ZBmeZzdmZn7UQyVwVsLC2oaMh?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
